prompt:
Scene:
A square entertainment marketing key visual for Social Teaser Promo Carousel, designed like a polished campaign asset ready for posters, covers, feeds, or street placement. The composition should have immediate impact from a distance while still carrying layered detail up close. Keep the lighting dramatic, the hierarchy bold, and the framing tight enough to feel like real promotional art instead of a casual illustration.

Subject:
Center the piece on Genre Pivot, a frame that keeps the hierarchy but bends color, props, and supporting scenes toward a different subgenre. Translate Design teaser carousels and social promo grids that work as standalone posts but also lock together into a larger release narrative. into a concrete campaign image with clear protagonist hierarchy, supporting world-building cues, and unmistakable promotional intent. The viewer should understand the genre, the ensemble relationships, and the commercial purpose at a glance without relying on readable text or existing brand marks.

Important details:
The challenge is disciplined hype. Preserve focal hierarchy, readable silhouette separation, strong foreground-background layering, and a convincing balance between character energy and structured layout. This theme studies structured-layout, editing-workflow, commercial-mockup, text-rendering through a production-ready visual system. Even if typography is unreadable, space for title blocks, badges, or platform framing should feel intentionally designed. Aim for clear hierarchy, polished craft, and immediately usable campaign logic.

Use case:
Social Teaser Promo Carousel series study 3/4.

Constraints:
No readable text, no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio, no broken anatomy, no unreadable hierarchy collapse, no muddy montage, no accidental real movie logos, no random filler characters, no off-topic props.
title: Genre Pivot
description: Genre Pivot for Social Teaser Promo Carousel, keeps the hierarchy but bends color, props, and supporting scenes toward a different subgenre.

generation.runner_notes: Preserve the anchor image identity while varying the requested campaign angle.
